PROP-01b-partial1-inv-001.text: bid() reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry via attacker-controlled callback execution.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-001.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): s_entered == true during callback => re-entry to bid() reverts ReentrantCall()

locations.note: s_entered checked at 415, set true at 418, cleared at 457; ReentrantCall revert on re-entry
